mapper.select: select user_id as userId, user_code as userCode, memory_enabled as memoryEnabled, answer_style as answerStyle, favorite_modules as favoriteModules, query_habits as queryHabits, (select count(1) from ai_user_memory m where m.deleted = 0 and m.user_id = p.user_id and ifnull(m.user_code, '') = ifnull(p.user_code, '')) as memoryCount, date_format(last_recall_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastRecallTime, profile_version as profileVersion, answer_style_json as answerStyleJson, query_strategy_json as queryStrategyJson, module_affinity_json as moduleAffinityJson, profile_confidence as profileConfidence, date_format(compiled_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as compiledAt from ai_user_profile p where user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ai_user_profile (id, user_id, user_code, memory_enabled, answer_style, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{userCode}, 1, #{answerStyle}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, 0) on duplicate key update deleted = 0, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.update: update ai_user_profile set memory_enabled = #{memoryEnabled}, answer_style = #{answerStyle}, updated_at = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0

update ai_user_profile set favorite_modules = #{favoriteModules}, query_habits = #{queryHabits}, updated_at = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0

update ai_user_profile set answer_style = #{answerStyle}, favorite_modules = #{favoriteModules}, query_habits = #{queryHabits}, answer_style_json = #{answerStyleJson}, query_strategy_json = #{queryStrategyJson}, module_affinity_json = #{moduleAffinityJson}, profile_confidence = #{profileConfidence}, profile_version = ifnull(profile_version, 0) + 1, compiled_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0
mapper.select:
select id, memory_type as memoryType, memory_title as memoryTitle, memory_summary as memorySummary, confidence, qdrant_point_id as qdrantPointId, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createTime, date_format(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updateTime, date_format(last_recall_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastRecallTime, status, memory_scope as memoryScope, scope_value as scopeValue, conflict_group as conflictGroup, priority, evidence_count as evidenceCount, negative_count as negativeCount, superseded_by as supersededBy, date_format(last_applied_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastAppliedAt, policy_json as policyJson from ai_user_memory
order by updated_at desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select id, memory_type as memoryType, memory_title as memoryTitle, memory_summary as memorySummary, confidence, qdrant_point_id as qdrantPointId, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createTime, date_format(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updateTime, date_format(last_recall_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastRecallTime, status, memory_scope as memoryScope, scope_value as scopeValue, conflict_group as conflictGroup, priority, evidence_count as evidenceCount, negative_count as negativeCount, superseded_by as supersededBy, date_format(last_applied_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastAppliedAt, policy_json as policyJson from ai_user_memory where deleted = 0 and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and status in ('ACTIVE', 'WEAKENING') and (effective_from is null or effective_from <= current_timestamp) and (effective_until is null or effective_until > current_timestamp) and (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or memory_title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or memory_summary like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) order by priority desc, last_recall_time desc, confidence desc, updated_at desc limit #{limit}

select id, memory_type as memoryType, memory_title as memoryTitle, memory_summary as memorySummary, confidence, qdrant_point_id as qdrantPointId, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createTime, date_format(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updateTime, date_format(last_recall_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastRecallTime, status, memory_scope as memoryScope, scope_value as scopeValue, conflict_group as conflictGroup, priority, evidence_count as evidenceCount, negative_count as negativeCount, superseded_by as supersededBy, date_format(last_applied_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastAppliedAt, policy_json as policyJson from ai_user_memory where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ai_user_memory ( id, user_id, user_code, memory_type, memory_key, memory_scope, scope_value, conflict_group, priority, evidence_count, status, policy_json, memory_title, memory_summary, confidence, qdrant_point_id, source_conversation_id, source_trace_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) values ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{userCode}, #{memoryType}, #{memoryKey}, #{memoryScope}, #{scopeValue}, #{conflictGroup}, #{priority}, #{evidenceCount}, #{status}, #{policyJson}, #{memoryTitle}, #{memorySummary}, #{confidence}, #{qdrantPointId}, #{sourceConversationId}, #{sourceTraceId}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, 0 )
mapper.select: select id from ai_user_memory where deleted = 0 and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and conflict_group = #{conflictGroup} and status in ('ACTIVE', 'WEAKENING') order by priority desc, confidence desc, updated_at desc
mapper.update: update ai_user_memory set status = 'SUPERSEDED', superseded_by = #{newMemoryId}, effective_until = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where deleted = 0 and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and conflict_group = #{conflictGroup} and id != #{newMemoryId} and status in ('ACTIVE', 'WEAKENING')

update ai_user_memory set status = #{status}, effective_from = case when #{status} = 'ACTIVE' then current_timestamp else effective_from end, effective_until = case when #{status} in ('ARCHIVED', 'REJECTED', 'SUPERSEDED') then current_timestamp else effective_until end, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0
update ai_user_memory set last_applied_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, memory_type as memoryType, memory_title as memoryTitle, memory_summary as memorySummary, confidence, qdrant_point_id as qdrantPointId, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createTime, date_format(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updateTime, date_format(last_recall_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastRecallTime, status, memory_scope as memoryScope, scope_value as scopeValue, conflict_group as conflictGroup, priority, evidence_count as evidenceCount, negative_count as negativeCount, superseded_by as supersededBy, date_format(last_applied_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastAppliedAt, policy_json as policyJson from ai_user_memory where deleted = 0 and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and status in ('ACTIVE', 'WEAKENING') order by priority desc, confidence desc, updated_at desc limit #{limit}

select id from ai_user_memory where deleted = 0 and status = 'CANDIDATE' and (confidence >= #{minConfidence} or evidence_count >= #{minEvidenceCount}) order by evidence_count desc, confidence desc, updated_at asc limit #{limit}
select user_id as userId, user_code as userCode from ai_user_memory where deleted = 0 and status in ('ACTIVE', 'WEAKENING') group by user_id, user_code order by max(updated_at) desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update ai_user_memory set last_recall_time = current_timestamp, recall_count = ifnull(recall_count, 0) + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}

update ai_user_memory set reinforce_count = ifnull(reinforce_count, 0) + 1, last_reinforced_at = current_timestamp, confidence = least(ifnull(confidence, 0.80) + 0.02, 0.98), status = 'ACTIVE', updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}

update ai_user_memory set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id in
#{id}

update ai_user_memory set confidence = greatest(confidence - #{step}, 0.00), updated_at = current_timestamp where id in
#{id}
update ai_user_memory set deleted = 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where status = 'ARCHIVED' and deleted = 0 and updated_at < #{beforeTime}
mapper.select: select memory_title from ai_user_memory where deleted = 0 and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and status = 'ACTIVE' and memory_type in ('FAVORITE_MODULE', 'QUERY_HABIT') and last_recall_time is not null and last_recall_time >= #{sinceTime} order by recall_count desc, confidence desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update ai_user_memory set deleted = 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '')
mapper.insert: insert into ai_memory_event ( id, memory_id, event_type, event_source, user_id, user_code, trace_id, operation_id, login_session_id, ai_conversation_id, event_summary, created_at ) values ( #{id}, #{memoryId}, #{eventType}, #{eventSource}, #{userId}, #{userCode}, #{traceId}, #{operationId}, #{loginSessionId}, #{aiConversationId}, #{eventSummary}, current_timestamp )
